text:
うん、爪はいい状態ね。
斧は……ボロボロだけど
加工して使わせてもらうわ。

使える包丁の残りが
だいぶ心許なくなってたけど
これでしばらくは大丈夫そう。

どうもありがとう！
また何かあったらよろしくね

<%me>!
Just the person I wanted to see!

Yeah, those claws are in good condition. And
the axes... Well, they're a little worn out,
but I can sharpen them.

All my other knives aren't very reliable
anymore, but I should be fine for a while
with these.

Anyway, thanks so much! I'll call you when I
have another fire for you to put out.
